scenes.description: Mori Calliope completes the Agent Test level 3 (squats with a teacup on her head).
Vestia Zeta takes her turn on the Agent Test level 3.
The total scores are revealed, and Zeta is declared the overall winner.
Amelia Watson appears on screen to congratulate the participants and provide feedback.
Scene changes to a shooting range where Towa, Matsuri, and La+ are practicing with water guns. Zeta joins them.
Kobo Kanaeru appears on screen to explain the rules of the upcoming Aim Skill Test.

subtitles.original: Time's up!
subtitles.english: Time's up!

subtitles.original: Yes! That was my goal! That was my goal!
subtitles.english: Yes! That was my goal! That was my goal!

subtitles.original: Level 3, 24! And I didn't lose the cup even once!
subtitles.english: Level 3, 24! And I didn't lose the cup even once!

subtitles.original: You sure? Maybe there was tape.
subtitles.english: You sure? Maybe there was tape.

subtitles.original: Maybe there was tape involved.
subtitles.english: Maybe there was tape involved.

subtitles.original: I think she's cheating.
subtitles.english: I think she's cheating.

subtitles.original: Is it not? Yeah, no.
subtitles.english: Is it not? Yeah, no.

subtitles.original: Super glue? Was it super glue on IRyS's head? No!
subtitles.english: Super glue? Was it super glue on IRyS's head? No!

subtitles.original: Let's really test it. Let's really get in there and test it.
subtitles.english: Let's really test it. Let's really get in there and test it.

subtitles.original: You're gonna use me as the test?
subtitles.english: You're gonna use me as the test?

subtitles.original: Yeah.
subtitles.english: Yeah.

subtitles.original: It's Zeta's turn.
subtitles.english: It's Zeta's turn.

subtitles.original: Zeta's turn! Yeah! And you know what?
subtitles.english: Zeta's turn! Yeah! And you know what?

subtitles.original: Directly right in the center of your head so that it's less likely to fall off.
subtitles.english: Directly right in the center of your head so that it's less likely to fall off.

subtitles.original: This is like the best birthday ever.
subtitles.english: This is like the best birthday ever.

subtitles.original: Oh, yay! I'm glad.
subtitles.english: Oh, yay! I'm glad.

subtitles.original: Now then, are you ready? Three, two, one, start!
subtitles.english: Now then, are you ready? Three, two, one, start!

subtitles.original: Time's up!
subtitles.english: Time's up!

subtitles.original: Yay!
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: You did it! 26 is the final number.
subtitles.english: You did it! 26 is the final number.

subtitles.original: 26! Yay!
subtitles.english: 26! Yay!

subtitles.original: Does this mean the scores are what I think it is?
subtitles.english: Does this mean the scores are what I think it is?

subtitles.original: I think so!
subtitles.english: I think so!

subtitles.original: Is anyone keeping score?
subtitles.english: Is anyone keeping score?

subtitles.original: Staff-san has been keeping score for us!
subtitles.english: Staff-san has been keeping score for us!

subtitles.original: Yeah! You are a winner! You are a winner! I am a winner!
subtitles.english: Yeah! You are a winner! You are a winner! I am a winner!

subtitles.original: Yeah! You are a winner! What are the scores again?
subtitles.english: Yeah! You are a winner! What are the scores again?

subtitles.original: What matters is what's inside!
subtitles.english: What matters is what's inside!

subtitles.original: Seems like you guys completed the test! Woohoo! Some of you were able to lift pretty well.
subtitles.english: Seems like you guys completed the test! Woohoo! Some of you were able to lift pretty well.

subtitles.original: Maybe not for some, though. It was so much fun just watching!
subtitles.english: Maybe not for some, though. It was so much fun just watching!

subtitles.original: But come on, Zeta. You're the birthday girl!
subtitles.english: But come on, Zeta. You're the birthday girl!

subtitles.original: You should be showing us your crazy skills or something! Prove it to us next test, okay?
subtitles.english: You should be showing us your crazy skills or something! Prove it to us next test, okay?

subtitles.original: Well then, thank you for having me! This is Amelia Watson signing off.
subtitles.english: Well then, thank you for having me! This is Amelia Watson signing off.

subtitles.original: Until next time! Bye!
subtitles.english: Until next time! Bye!

subtitles.original: Bye Ame!
subtitles.english: Bye Ame!

subtitles.original: She just has really high standards, okay? Even if you won, it's not enough for her.
subtitles.english: She just has really high standards, okay? Even if you won, it's not enough for her.

subtitles.original: Well, she is a detective, so yeah. Not enough for her.
subtitles.english: Well, she is a detective, so yeah. Not enough for her.

subtitles.original: Thanks Ame! Love you! Bye-bye! Bye-bye! Good luck on your other tests!
subtitles.english: Thanks Ame! Love you! Bye-bye! Bye-bye! Good luck on your other tests!

subtitles.original: See ya!
subtitles.english: See ya!

subtitles.original: よし、レベル3スタート！ Darknessちゃん、あいつを狙おう！待って、Darknesss! あそこを狙おう！
subtitles.english: Okay, level 3 start! Darkness-chan, let's aim for her! Wait, Darknesss! Let's aim at that!

subtitles.original: あ！やめて！やめて！嫌だ！
subtitles.english: Ah! Stop it! Stop it! No!

subtitles.original: 助けて！嫌だ！やめて！助けて！
subtitles.english: Help me! No! Stop it! Help!

subtitles.original: 助けて！やめて！助けて！お願い！
subtitles.english: Help me! Stop! Help! Please!

subtitles.original: 多すぎる！助けて！
subtitles.english: It's too much! Help!

subtitles.original: イエーイ！イエーイ！楽しそう！
subtitles.english: Yeah! Yeah! It looks so fun!

subtitles.original: やめて！やめて！助けて！
subtitles.english: Stop! Stop! Help!

subtitles.original: はいはい、楽しそう！
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, yes! It's so fun!

subtitles.original: 楽しそう！見て見て！
subtitles.english: It's so fun! Look, look!

subtitles.original: ゼータ？何？これ何？なんで鉄砲持ってるの？
subtitles.english: Zeta? What? What's this? Why are you holding guns?

subtitles.original: やだ！やめて！やめて！嫌だ！
subtitles.english: No! Stop! Stop! No!

subtitles.original: 撃て！撃て！やっちゃえ！
subtitles.english: Shoot her! Shoot her! Get her!

subtitles.original: 嫌だ！やめて！助けて！
subtitles.english: No! Stop it! Help!

subtitles.original: あ、当たってる！見て見て！
subtitles.english: Ah, it's hitting her! Look at her go!

subtitles.original: 待って！なんでこんなことに？やめて！
subtitles.english: Wait! Why is this happening? Stop!

subtitles.original: どういうこと？誰か説明して！
subtitles.english: What does this mean? Someone explain!

subtitles.original: Bokobokoboko~ Kobo Kanaeru at your service! Let me be your sun to shine your day! Ehe!
subtitles.english: Bokobokoboko~ Kobo Kanaeru at your service! Let me be your sun to shine your day! Ehe!

subtitles.original: Zeta, happy birthday!
subtitles.english: Zeta, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: Thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: I already told them what to do before you came here, so they know the rules!
subtitles.english: I already told them what to do before you came here, so they know the rules!

subtitles.original: We're gonna be testing your aim skills with this water gun!
subtitles.english: We're gonna be testing your aim skills with this water gun!

subtitles.original: In shooting level 1, we will see how many immobile targets you can hit within 30 seconds!
subtitles.english: In shooting level 1, we will see how many immobile targets you can hit within 30 seconds!

subtitles.original: In level 2, we will see how many moving targets you can hit within 30 seconds!
subtitles.english: In level 2, we will see how many moving targets you can hit within 30 seconds!

subtitles.original: And level 3 will test if you can hit the targets on the moving zombie!
subtitles.english: And level 3 will test if you can hit the targets on the moving zombie!

subtitles.original: 誰が最強のエイム力を持っているかな？
subtitles.english: Who do you think is the best shooter here?

subtitles.original: 私！私！私！私が一番！
subtitles.english: Me! Me! Me! I'm the best!

subtitles.original: 常闇トワたち、みんなFPSやってるんでね！
subtitles.english: We all play FPS games, so we should be good!

subtitles.original: そうだね。私はやってないけどね！
subtitles.english: Yeah, right. I don't play though!

subtitles.original: 余裕余裕！余裕余裕！
subtitles.english: Easy peasy! Easy peasy!
